title: Add visual token usage bar to status line
description: Replace plain '45%' in status line with '████░░░░░░ 45%'. Need: 1) render_token_bar(pct, bar_width) helper in util.rs using block chars, 2) update status_line_spans in bottom_ui.rs to use bar, 3) update pct_seg width to account for bar chars. Design: ai/design/chat-rendering-enhancements.md
